tips: The Pomodoro Technique: Work for 25 mins, break for 5. Boosts focus significantly.
Eat the Frog: Complete your hardest task first thing in the morning.
2-Minute Rule: If a task takes less than 2 minutes, do it immediately.
Time Blocking: Schedule specific slots for specific tasks to avoid multitasking.
Mind Mapping: Visualize your project components to clear mental clutter.
Sleep is a Productivity Multiplier: 7-8 hours of sleep is non-negotiable for high performance.
Declutter your workspace: A clear desk leads to a clear mind.
The Pareto Principle: 80% of results come from 20% of your efforts. Find that 20%.
Digital Detox: Turn off non-essential notifications during deep work sessions.
Consistency > Intensity: Small daily gains lead to massive long-term results.
The 5-Second Rule: If you have an impulse to act on a goal, move within 5 seconds or your brain will kill the idea.
Single-Tasking: Research shows multitasking can reduce productivity by 40%. Focus on one thing.
Weekly Review: Spend 20 minutes every Sunday planning your upcoming week.
Batching: Group similar tasks (like emails or phone calls) together to stay in the flow.
The 1-3-5 Rule: Plan to finish 1 big task, 3 medium tasks, and 5 small tasks each day.
